name: @markdown-contract/example-single-binary
description: The canonical M-0008 example (D-0012 §D3 'one binary, two faces'): one Bun-compiled executable that is the markdown-contract CLI when run bare and a loopback daemon serving an embedded one-page SPA under `daemon`. Minimal by design — the product app is apps/web (M-0009).

scripts.build:binary: bun run ui:generate && bun run gen:assets && bun run compile
